update.author: Ava Thornton
update.done_this_week: Cleared the staging soak; production rollout scheduled for early next week.
update.target_next_week: Ship remaining PRs; start canary rollout by Wednesday.
update.blockers: A single reviewer is a bottleneck; needs a delegate.

update.done_this_week: Landed 3 of 5 PRs; last two under review with a partner team.
update.target_next_week: Ship remaining PRs; start canary rollout by Wednesday.

update.done_this_week: Cleared the staging soak; production rollout scheduled for early next week.

update.author: Hiro Vasquez
update.done_this_week: Landed 3 of 5 PRs; last two under review with a partner team.

update.author: Tomo Ilves
update.done_this_week: Landed 3 of 5 PRs; last two under review with a partner team.
update.target_next_week: Ship remaining PRs; start canary rollout by Wednesday.
